message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "InstallInstalling" as II
participant "PackageInstaller" as PI
participant "PackageInstallerService" as PIS
participant "InstallingAsyncTask" as IAT
participant "PackageInstallerSession" as PISess
participant "Handler" as H
participant "mHandlerCallback" as mHC
participant "PkMS" as PkMS
participant "PkMS.PackageHandler" as PkMSPH
participant "PkMS.HandlerParams" as PkMSHP
participant "PkMS.InstallParams" as PkMSIP

II -> II : onCreate()
II -> PI : createSession()
PI -> PIS : createSession()
PIS --> PI : sessionId
PI --> II : sessionId
II -> II : onResume()
II -> IAT : execute()
IAT -> IAT : doInBackground()
IAT -> PIS : openSession(sessionId)
PIS --> IAT : Session
IAT -> PISess : openWrite()
IAT -> IAT : doPostExecute()
IAT -> PISess : commit()
PISess -> H : sendToTarget(MSG_COMMIT)
H -> mHC : handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)
mHC -> PISess : handleCommit()
PISess -> PISess : commitNonStagedLocked()
PISess -> PkMS : installStage()
PkMS -> PkMSPH : sendMessage(INIT_COPY)
PkMSPH -> PkMSHP : startCopy()
PkMSHP -> PkMSIP : handleStartCopy()
PkMSHP -> PkMSIP : handleReturnCode()
PkMSIP -> PkMS : processPendingInstall()
PkMS -> PkMS : processInstallRequestsAsync()
PkMS -> PkMS : installPackagesTracedLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : installPackagesLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : preparePackageLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : scanPackageTracedLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitPackagesLocked()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitReconciledScanResultLocked()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitPackageSettings()

@enduml
```
